column3: Interview local cricket academy managers, coaches and players to validate pain points around officiating and training; gather requirements for officiating and coaching features
Research market size of cricket academies and amateur clubs in London and globally; compile competitor analysis of existing single-purpose tools (PitchVision, Str8bat, etc.)
Assemble tripod-mounted unit with high-speed camera, directional mic, thermal sensor and wireless module; integrate battery and evaluate cost
Design and 3D-print stump housing with embedded microcontroller, accelerometer and vibration sensor; test detection of bail dislodgement and edge vibrations
Select SBC (e.g., NVIDIA Jetson) and integrate camera inputs and wireless feeds; implement data ingestion pipeline to AI core
column5: Working hub with connectivity and basic data ingestion

column3: Train YOLOv8 or equivalent models for ball detection and use multi-camera triangulation to compute trajectory; implement algorithms for no-ball, wides, bounce points
column5: Model trained, tested on sample footage

column3: Develop algorithms to correlate directional mic data and thermal readings for impact events (bat-ball, bat-pad); calibrate sensors for accuracy
Integrate MediaPipe Pose or similar to capture bowler and batter body positions; compute biomechanical metrics (bat angle, release point) for coaching analytics
column5: Pose estimation module with basic metrics

column3: Create Figma wireframes for user personas (players, coaches, academy owners, parents); design modules for real-time decisions display, session highlights, statistics
Set up cloud backend (Firebase or custom) for user authentication, session storage, and data retrieval; ensure secure access and data segregation
Build responsive web/mobile application using React or Flutter; integrate real-time dashboard for officiating decisions and post-session analytics
column5: MVP front-end integrated with backend and AI core

column3: Install Pitch Pods, Smart Stumps and Hub at a local cricket academy; run pilot sessions to test hardware robustness and algorithm accuracy
Gather metrics: decision accuracy (no-ball, LBW, run-out), user adoption, session counts; solicit feedback from players and coaches; record bugs and improvements
column5: Pilot feedback report with improvement backlog

column3: Iterate on hardware components (sensor placement, battery life) and software algorithms; address pilot feedback and fix reliability issues
column5: Updated prototype ready for broader market

column3: Engage with manufacturers for Pitch Pod and Smart Stump production; prepare BOM, identify suppliers and cost per unit
Define pricing tiers (Training, Academy, Enterprise), create marketing materials (pitch deck, demo video), plan outreach to mid-sized London academies
